posts.author: Bacone_
posts.body: Predictions: 0 of 2 Pending | Tied for 1st with 30 others looking like it was generated by a microwave. This poster got that straight-from-the-AI-slop factory vibe. Shiny for no reason, generic as hell, looks like a fake event you see in career mode.

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 2 of 2 Pending | Tied for 1st with 30 others Santalahti vs. FialhoAndre Fialho, TKO, R1So funny seeing Fialho back; one of the worst short notice signings in recent years. He deserved his shot but it was so funny seeing him go on this massive L streak. He is a very bizarre fighter, has all the tools to be good but a glass jaw and 3 minutes of cardio. I’m actually pretty shocked he’s fighting again after the Jumaev fight. That was one of the worst KO’s on his entire losing streak and to the lowest level opponent as well. Olli isn’t really good at anything other than being tough, so I guess fialho should win. He will gas bad without an early finish but he’s always had very good tdd so it’s interesting
